rawAssistant: Preparing for the spire is a serious matter. The road ahead won't be easy, especially with that east wind whipping up soot. Make sure your cloak is secure and your gear is in order. A good night's rest will also serve you well; exhaustion can cloud judgment on treacherous paths like these.
